4. Are there any reasons why this application should not be dealt with
arrived at.
on paper by a judge?
Note 4:
Yes. It should not be dealt with on paper by a judge because
The court will only deal with
the application ‘without a
hearing’ in the following
circumstances:
• where all the parties agree
to the terms of the order
being asked for;
• where all the parties agree
that the court should
deal with the application
No without a hearing; or
• where the court does not
consider that a hearing
would be appropriate.
Domestic Abuse Act 2021
Provisions in the Domestic Abuse Act 2021 have the effect of preventing
an individual accused of abuse from questioning in person a party or
witness in the case who is the victim of the abuse, and also prevents
a victim of abuse from questioning in person the accused individual in
specified circumstances.
If the court directs that the proceedings be listed for a hearing where
oral evidence may be given, form EX740 (person making the abuse
accusation) or form EX741 (person accused of abuse) ‘Application and
information needed by the court to consider whether to prevent (prohibit)

metadata.title: Apply for an interim order as part of divorce, dissolution or separation court proceedings: Form D11
metadata.description: Use this form to make a general application (‘application notice’) as part of divorce, dissolution or separation court proceedings.
